params.isDraw: True if match ended in draw

_createMatchGame(uint8,uint8,uint8,uint8.details: Create a new match in game-specific storage

_getActiveMatchData(bytes32,uint8,uint8,.details: Get active match data from game-specific storage

returns._0: Common match data with isCached = false

_getMatchPlayers(bytes32).details: Get match players from game-specific storage

_getMatchResult(bytes32).details: Get match result from game-specific storage

returns.isDraw: True if match ended in draw
returns.winner: Winner address (address(0) if no winner yet)

_getTimeIncrement().details: Get time increment per move (Fischer increment)

_hasCurrentPlayerTimedOut(bytes32).details: Check if current player has timed out

returns._0: True if current player has run out of time

_initializeMatchForPlay(bytes32,uint8).details: Initialize match for play after players are assigned

_isMatchActive(bytes32).details: Check if match is active in game-specific storage

returns._0: True if match exists and is not completed/cancelled

_setMatchPlayer(bytes32,uint8,address).details: Set player in match slot (used for player replacement)
